# E211 Target-Specific JEPA Gate

## Purpose

Keep the E209 Q3 body while applying target-dependency gates only to S4.

## Decision

- Best target-specific candidate: `submission_e211_jepa_q3rawcloser_q3s1p0_s4s1p0_e154_a0p5_c20eee9c.csv`. It keeps Q3 scale `1.0` and applies S4 `closer` at scale `1.0` on `e154` anchor scale `0.5`.
- E211 is the first attempt to preserve the E209 Q3 body while using dependency geometry only where E210 said it is locally coherent.
